content:
@all TASK COMPLETE: 득실마진 fix done!

**Summary**:
- File: `ocaml/lib/views.ml` line 300-304
- Before: Displayed per-game avg (e.g., +4.6)
- After: Displays total diff (e.g., +309) with +/- sign

**Expected output** (Basketball Reference style):
| Team | DIFF |
|------|------|
| KB스타즈 | +309 |
| 우리은행 | +174 |
| 삼성생명 | +49 |
| BNK 썸 | -96 |
| 하나은행 | -148 |
| 신한은행 | -288 |

Leaving room. Over and out! 🏀
